case_title: DAVANA BOLTON VS. ERIC SINCLAIR JACKSON

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY BOLTON, DAVANA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. 506 PLAINTIFF DAVANA BOLTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED JUN-12-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY BOLTON, DAVANA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLTON, DAVANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, ERIC SINCLAIR $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $730.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOLTON, DAVANA
